assignment.objective: Define a privacy-minimizing retrospective evidence contract after the higher-priority real Lab 0 run was blocked.
assignment.selected_reason: A real Ubuntu or devcontainer Lab 0 row was attempted first, but repository checkout was unavailable; DATA-01 was the next dependency-safe assignment.
assignment.blocker: The execution environment could not resolve github.com, preventing repository and pinned llama.cpp checkout for a measured Lab 0 run.

failures.summary: DNS resolution failure prevented cloning the repository and pinned llama.cpp source, so no measured environment row was claimed.

decisions: Review the retrospective coding rules and first multi-run batch before using the dataset for publication analysis.

claims.label: Verified
claims.statement: The retrospective evidence contract and semantic validator passed commit-scoped Documentation CI.

claims.label: Verified
claims.statement: The blocked Lab 0 execution was recorded without inflating it into a reproducibility result.

claims.label: Open Question
claims.statement: Measured Ubuntu and devcontainer Lab 0 rows remain unavailable.
